retry_reason: This is a put operation; the refcount decrement always succeeds (it does not return an error), and retrying would be a double-put leading to use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a release (put) wrapper for struct bpf_testmod_ctx. It decrements the reference count via refcount_dec_and_test and, if the count reaches zero, schedules the object for RCU-free through call_rcu. The caller must not access the ctx object after calling this function, as it may have been freed. This function is the destructor counterpart to a prior get/increment operation.
